//: Contact registry (Phase 10b, presentation_layer_narrative.md §4.2). contact_id -> display metadata for the Burner Phone's threaded messages. 'unknown' is the reserved fallback thread for events an authored batch never tags with "contact" -- always present (ContactRegistry synthesizes it even if a future edit drops this row). The named contacts group the shipped gritty events (Sonnet 5, 10b tagging pass): coach_reyes carries the on-field/clubhouse arc, agent_diaz carries league/legal/health correspondence, girlfriend_jess carries the pro-era romance/marriage/family arc (age > 20), family_mom carries the pre-16 heir-interest beats. family_mom + family_dad are the HS-2 household threads -- CreateAvatar now inserts two real parent NPC Players rows; the HS-5 hs_dating_events.json batch finally gives family_dad content (the parental-approval beat). hs_sweetheart is HS-5's own pre-marriage dating-funnel thread (role: partner, gender-neutral) -- deliberately distinct from girlfriend_jess so the two romance arcs (HS vs pro) never share a contact thread or collide on the met_someone age>20 gate. The syndicate/arrest arc stays on 'unknown' by design -- those events are deliberately anonymous threats, not named relationships.
